title: ononis aragonensis subsp. reuteri
intro: Ononis aragonensis subsp. reuteri, also known as the Spanish restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the legume family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ononis aragonensis subsp. reuteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
